name: Nicotinic Acid (Veterinary) | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: For dairy cow: Increases milk production in lactating cow and also increases the fat content of milkFor Poultry: Reduces muscular dystrophy Improves poor feathering Cure mouth lesions Helps to prevent diarrhea
dosage_amp;_administration: For Dairy cow: 1-2 bolus per day. For better result 1 bolus in the morning and 1 bolus in the evening. For Poultry: 1 bolus for 60-75 hens for 3-5 days. Or as advised by the registered veterinarian.
storage_conditions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from light. Keep all medicine out of reach of children.
